The Jülich Supercomputing Centre (JSC) has acquired a 5-qubit quantum system from IQM Quantum Computer.

interaction_phrase: providing science and industry in Germany
occurrence_sentence: Through this platform, JSC is providing science and industry in Germany and Europe with access to state-of-the-art quantum computers.

interaction_phrase: has acquired a 5-qubit quantum system from
occurrence_sentence: The Jülich Supercomputing Centre (JSC) has acquired a 5-qubit quantum system from IQM Quantum Computers, a global leader in building quantum computers.

"JSC deploying our system to their premises is pivotal in our journey as we continue to drive large-scale commercial quantum adoption for businesses, academia, and research institutions worldwide. With our outstanding technical capabilities, we are excited to work closely with JSC in its goal of establishing a leading development and user community from industry and science for quantum computing applications across Germany and Europe," said Mikko Välimäki , Co-CEO of IQM Quantum Computers.

interaction_phrase: providing science and industry in Germany

"With our outstanding technical capabilities, we are excited to work closely with JSC in its goal of establishing a leading development and user community from industry and science for quantum computing applications across Germany and Europe,"
"We will provide technical support to JSC, and we are confident that our system will deepen research in Germany."
"We will provide technical support to JSC, and we are confident that our system will deepen research in Germany."
